mapper.update: update short_link_db.campaign set name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, campaign_type = #{campaignType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, creator_user_id = #{creatorUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, start_time = #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, end_time = #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, budget = #{budget,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select id, name, description, campaign_type, status, creator_user_id, start_time, end_time, budget, reject_reason, create_time, update_time from short_link_db.campaign where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
select id, name, description, campaign_type, status, creator_user_id, start_time, end_time, budget, reject_reason, create_time, update_time from short_link_db.campaign
